name: MARCH
signatureDish: Rotating multi-course regional Mediterranean tasting menu (changes by 'season')
tips: Book on OpenTable, NOT Resy (the Resy listing is for the separate Lounge at MARCH).
Reservations open exactly 60 days out — mark your calendar and be ready early.
Be flexible on weekday/early seatings (Tue-Sat, 6-10pm).
VERIFY release time

name: Sushi Horiuchi
signatureDish: ~20-course omakase; pecan-tofu custard with trout roe, Wagyu sukiyaki with white truffle
tips: Be in the Resy app at exactly 10:00 AM CT, 30 days out — logged in, card saved (prepaid). Only 6 seats per night.
Bookable only in parties of 2, 4, or 6 (no odd-numbered parties).
Use Resy 'Notify' with push on for cancellations.
Weeknights (Tue/Wed) clear slightly less instantly than Fri/Sat.

name: Oru
signatureDish: Scored-and-sauced nigiri, Wagyu Lumpia, chawanmushi with trout roe
tips: Set a Resy 'Notify' alert and be ready the instant slots drop — only ~24 counter seats.
Target off-peak nights (Tue/Wed) and early/late seatings; open Tue-Sat.
Watch Resy's Houston Hit List and Comma Hospitality channels for release announcements.
VERIFY release time

name: Tatemó
signatureDish: Corn-centric tasting menu; tostada de tuna with caviar, enmolada with mole negro
tips: Reservations drop in the first week of each month for the FOLLOWING month — check Tock then.
Pre-load a Tock account with card saved (prepaid $155/person tasting).
Be flexible Wed/Thu and party of 2; only ~20 seats, Wed-Sat only.
BYOB. Email info@tatemohtx.com for dietary needs and cancellation re-releases.
Release time assumed midnight CT on the 1st — VERIFY exact drop day/time

name: MAD
signatureDish: Wood-fired paella; steak tartare served in edible newsprint
tips: Grab slots the moment new dates open (booked out ~6 weeks ahead).
Set a Resy 'Notify' alert for cancellations.
Target Tue/Wed over Thu-Sat; bar seats also require reservations.
VERIFY release time

name: Bludorn
signatureDish: Baked Alaska; smoked short rib & blue cheese ravioli
tips: Book via the Resy app, not the phone line.
Avoid Fri/Sat and holidays for first attempts — weeknights and Sunday are easier.
Set a Resy 'Notify' alert to catch cancellations.
Consider Bar Bludorn (separate Resy page) as a walk-in-friendly fallback.
VERIFY release time

name: Jūn
signatureDish: Thai-inspired fried chicken; charred whole fish with guajillo and lime
tips: Book on OpenTable as far ahead as possible — demand spiked after the chefs' 2026 James Beard 'Best Chef: Texas' win.
Email booking@junbykin.com for parties of 6+.
Try early Wed/Thu 5pm seatings; set an OpenTable cancellation alert.
VERIFY release time

name: Baso
signatureDish: Basque cheesecake (optional caviar); charred shrimp; venison tartare
tips: Book prime-time 1-2 weeks ahead; confirm via OpenTable (the official site has a legacy Resy listing — OpenTable is current).
5pm/9pm slots open more easily.
Walk-in bar/kitchen counter is the easiest way in.
Parties cap at 6 (larger = buyout).
VERIFY release time

name: Kira
signatureDish: Steak-and-eggs temaki (seared wagyu); A5 wagyu + shaved truffle donburi
tips: Book primetime on Resy exactly when the ~3-week window opens; saved profile/card ready (only 15 seats).
If gone, target day-of 5pm/9pm slots and set a Resy 'Notify' alert.
Be flexible on party of 2 and weekdays.
VERIFY release time

name: Nobie's
signatureDish: Texas Tartare; Dilly Bread with 'everything butter'; Nonno's Pasta (bolognese)
tips: Book exactly 4 weeks out when the date enters the window; check early in the day.
Start from nobieshtx.com to land on the current SevenRooms link (ignore the old Tock page).
Join the SevenRooms waitlist if sold out; arrive at 5pm for walk-in bar seats.
VERIFY release time

name: Squable
signatureDish: Dutch baby pancake; French cheeseburger with raclette; agnolotti
tips: Book early and use Resy 'Notify'.
Roughly half the room is held for walk-ins — arrive early for the bar.
Target Tue-Thu; parties of 7+ handled separately via direct contact.
VERIFY release time

name: Sushi by Hidden
signatureDish: 12-course nigiri omakase (chef's selection, daily market fish)
tips: Be online at exactly 12:00 PM CT (noon), 14 days out — that's when the new day opens on Resy.
Resy only — no walk-in or phone bookings; only a 10-seat counter.
BYOB ($20 corkage for 720ml+).
Parties of 10+ require a full buyout (email info@sushibyhidden.com).

name: Le Jardinier
signatureDish: Maine scallops with caper-raisin coulis; white truffle tagliatelle
tips: Check SevenRooms, OpenTable AND Resy — availability differs per platform (https://www.opentable.com/r/le-jardinier-houston).
Lunch and weekend brunch are far easier than dinner.
Request patio/sculpture-garden seating; book early for Houston Restaurant Weeks.
VERIFY release time

name: Uchi Houston
signatureDish: Hama Chili (yellowtail, orange, Thai chili, ponzu)
tips: Book through SevenRooms, not Resy/OpenTable (the Resy listing is stale).
Target Tue-Thu for easier availability; reserve weekends 3-4 weeks ahead.
Daily happy hour (4-6pm) is a lower-friction way in.
VERIFY release time

name: Da Marco
signatureDish: Osso Buco; Cacio e Pepe; daily seasonal blackboard specials
tips: Note the dress code (jacket preferred; no hats/t-shirts/shorts/sneakers).
Book weekends via Resy in advance; weeknights are more flexible.
Phone 713-807-8857 for last-minute or large parties.
VERIFY release time

name: Hugo's
signatureDish: Sunday brunch buffet; Oaxacan moles; housemade tamales
tips: Book the Sunday brunch buffet (11am-3pm) well ahead — it's the hardest slot.
Weeknights (Tue/Wed dinner) are the easiest.
Book directly via SevenRooms or call 713-524-7744.
VERIFY release time
